comment.body:
If you’re trading SPX intraday… Gotta be on the 5 min time frame (not 30) 

Best answer I can come up with this is to combine the indicator with her mean reversion script and the daily levels and you can play around with the ma. Back test it with her old intraday entry script inputs and make sure you’re getting signals that give you a signal at the risk levels. If you’re not you need to use a  lower  and lower ma until you do. And from there you have to live with the number of  signals you get
comment.raw_body:
If you’re trading SPX intraday… Gotta be on the 5 min time frame (not 30) 

Best answer I can come up with this is to combine the indicator with her mean reversion script and the daily levels and you can play around with the ma. Back test it with her old intraday entry script inputs and make sure you’re getting signals that give you a signal at the risk levels. If you’re not you need to use a  lower  and lower ma until you do. And from there you have to live with the number of  signals you get

comment.body: My understanding is that later in the session positive speed will get steeper as color decays gamma, this positive speed will lead to potentially increased upside volatility. later in the session negative charm will cause sold OTM puts (in particular) to gain delta (head towards 0)  leading to positve flow as the hedges are unwound.
